title: Marsh Hymns. - Thou and I.
content:
So one in heart and thought, I trow,
    That thou might'st press the strings and I might draw the bow
    And both would meet in music sweet,
    Thou and I, I trow.


    1881.
meaning:
"Marsh Hymns. - Thou and I." is a quintessential example of Sidney Lanier's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
